name: INTENSITY THERAPEUTICS, INC.
business: Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. is a late-stage clinical biotechnology company focused on intratumoral cancer therapy. Its lead product candidate, INT230-6, is an injectable formulation containing cisplatin, vinblastine sulfate, and SHAO amphiphilic molecule for direct tumor injection.
sellsTo: Patients with refractory or metastatic solid tumors

exposures.sentence: Our lead product candidate, INT230-6, is primarily comprised of three components: (i) cisplatin, a proven anti-cancer cytotoxic agent, (ii) vinblastine sulfate, also a proven anti-cancer cytotoxic agent, and (iii) SHAO, a penetration enhancing amphiphilic molecule.

catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we paused new site activations and patient enrollments due to funding constraints.

catalysts.event: Restart of INVINCIBLE-3 Study when funded
catalysts.sentence: Once sufficient funding is obtained, we plan to restart site activations and patient enrollment in the INVINCIBLE-3 Study.

In September 2025, we paused new patient enrollment to revise the dosing regimen for patients receiving INT230-6 in Cohort A due to some patients in Cohort A experiencing localized skin irritation near the tumor site.
Full approval to resume enrollment was granted on March 26, 2026, and we plan to resume enrollment in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Target complete enrollment of INVINCIBLE-4 Study
catalysts.sentence: We are currently targeting to complete enrollment by the end of 2027 and will likely add resources to help sites enroll new patients.
